---
name: AgentHook Proposal (AHP)
about: Substantive specification change. Use for new event types, required fields, conformance levels, or schema_version bumps.
title: "AHP-NNN: <short title>"
labels: ["AHP", "draft"]
---

If this is a substantive specification change, please open a pull request adding `PROPOSALS/AHP-NNN-short-title.md` using [the AHP template](../../blob/main/PROPOSALS/TEMPLATE.md). Issues are for discussion before drafting; the canonical Proposal lives in the PR.
